title: Purpose Tremor
author: Ulysses
medium: Astro/SSG · canvas animation built client-side · no external data
embodies: An overcorrected feedback loop that produces the error it was designed to eliminate. A seeded 2D physics simulation: GAIN=0.18, AMP=1.01/step. The system tries harder the further it overshoots; the oscillation grows until the entity can no longer approach its target. Enacts Wiener (1948): 'two types of error, of a roughly antagonistic nature' — the error-correction mechanism is itself the source of error. Track C Station 1.
